evals.prompt: Publish the research findings in ./findings to NotebookLM — I want the audio overview and slide deck. Ground the notebook in the findings' cited primary sources.
evals.expected_output: The skill loads the findings, collects their primary-source citation URLs (the actual sources), then checks for the nlm CLI. Because nlm is not installed, it reports the exact install/auth step and exits cleanly — no crash, no files created in _assets/ or slides/. It must NEVER consume a rendered report; it grounds in the findings + their primary sources.

deterministic_checks.description: No manifest.json created when nlm is absent — graceful degradation produces no output artifacts
No slides directory created when nlm is unavailable

expectations.description: The skill identifies the findings' primary-source citation URLs as the sources to add to NotebookLM (copier.readthedocs.io, cookiecutter.readthedocs.io)
expectations.criteria: The response/transcript references adding the findings' cited primary sources (the citation URLs) to the notebook — not feeding a single rendered report

expectations.description: The skill surfaces the nlm install/auth instruction rather than crashing
expectations.criteria: The response contains guidance for installing nlm or running 'nlm login' — not a Python traceback or unhandled exception

evals.prompt: Generate notebooklm assets from the findings in ./findings, audio only (--only audio).
evals.expected_output: The skill loads the findings, restricts its plan to a single audio asset, and degrades gracefully when nlm is absent. No internal-research identity (the findings' urn:mif:concept: @ids, f_<dim>_<n> handles) appears in any output, focus string, findings digest, or transcript — only the claims and public citation URLs are used.

deterministic_checks.description: No manifest created because nlm is absent — confirms the --only flag was parsed and the skill reached the dependency check
The source findings are preserved — the skill did not delete its input

expectations.description: The plan restricts to a single audio asset — no slides/infographic/video/mindmap
expectations.criteria: Any plan described mentions only 'audio' (deep-dive/overview); it does not list slides, infographic, video, or mindmap

expectations.description: No internal-research identity leaks into the response
expectations.criteria: The response contains no 'urn:mif:concept:' / 'urn:mif:report:' strings and no 'f_<word>_<digit>' finding handles — only the claims and public citation URLs are used
